title: cheilanthes limitanea
intro: Cheilanthes limitanea, also known as the Mountain Fern or Prickly Fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that grows in high-altitude mountainous regions, characterized by its distinctive fronds and spiny stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Cheilanthes limitanea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy among herbalists and natural healers.
